entities.name: Self-Knowledge Deficit
entities.context: V's position that the fundamental bottleneck in effective job seeking is lack of self-knowledge, not resume writing or interview skills

entities.name: Self-knowledge
entities.context: The ability to articulate what one wants, what one is good at, and what environments allow thriving

entities.name: AI
entities.context: Technology that removes friction from application generation, amplifying either self-knowledge or its absence

entities.name: Resume writing
entities.context: Traditional job seeking skill that V argues is NOT the fundamental bottleneck

entities.name: Interview skills
entities.context: Traditional job seeking skill that V argues is NOT the fundamental bottleneck

entities.name: Application generation
entities.context: The process of creating job applications, now friction-free due to AI

relationships.context: This is V's documented position in the hiring-market domain
The deficit is the lack of self-knowledge in job seekers
AI removes friction from the application generation process
AI makes the self-knowledge gap the binding constraint by removing other friction
Those with self-knowledge use AI as amplification; those without use it as a crutch
